# Available Sprites (TextMeshPro)

Sprites from `Assets/Art/Fonts/Spritesheets/common_spritesheet.asset`.  
Use in text as `<sprite name="NAME">`.  
**Source of truth:** scan `m_Name:` fields in that file, ignoring auto-generated names like `common_spritesheet_N`, `color_common_spritesheet_N`, or `NicePng_fantasy-map-icons-png_2379148_N`.

---
